text.title: Architecture Workflows Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the workflow-instance artefact. Validator enforces named workflow + role per step + review gates.

example.note: instance_id pattern fails; workflow_type not in enum; role "team" invalid; artefact_path empty; type-1 decision without review_gate violates review-gate-on-decision rule.

list.item: any step.role outside {clarifier, designer, critic, documenter, stakeholder}.
abort_condition missing or shorter than 8 chars.
